entries.definition:
c-th-w/y tangled hair, to go haywire; to act wickedly, to harm, to cause mischief; male hyena, a crude unkempt person, a fool. Of this root, only تعثوا tacthaw, occurs five times in the Qurʾan.
تعثى tacthā [imperf. v., intrans. with prep. في] to cause corruption, to cause destruction, to act mischievously (26:183) ولا تعثوا في الأرض مفسدين and do not perniciously spread corruption on earth.

تعثى tacthā [imperf. v., intrans. with prep. في] to cause corruption, to cause destruction, to act mischievously (26:183) ولا تعثوا في الأرض مفسدين and do not perniciously spread corruption on earth.
